speaker: VANCE
text: This is Session Two. You’ve learned how to place your body. You’ve learned how to reach. Today is about connection. Not power. Not speed. Flow. Here is Mac.

speaker: MAC
text: Mac here. Session Two. This session builds on what you learned last time. Nothing new yet. Same stance. Same guard. Same punches. The difference today is how they connect. We start by returning to stance.

speaker: MAC
text: Set your stance. Train tracks. Not a tightrope. Front foot forward. Back foot turned slightly. Knees soft. Weight balanced. Hold this. This is your base. We always come back here.

speaker: MAC
text: Bring the hands up. Cheek level. Elbows in. Shoulders relaxed. This isn’t tension. It’s readiness. Once the guard is set, leave it there.

speaker: MAC
text: After me. Four at a time. Hands set. One. Hands set. Two. Hands set. Three. Hands set. Four. Pause. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Pause. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Stay in stance.

speaker: MAC
text: Back to the jab. This punch controls space. It keeps things where you want them. Front hand. Straight out. Straight back. Loose arm. Fast out. Fast back.

speaker: MAC
text: After me. Four at a time. Jab. One. Jab. Two. Jab. Three. Jab. Four. Pause. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Pause. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Hands down briefly if needed.

speaker: MAC
text: Now the cross. This punch connects the body to the arm. Back foot presses. Hip turns. Shoulder follows. The arm stays relaxed.

speaker: MAC
text: After me. Four at a time. Cross. One. Cross. Two. Cross. Three. Cross. Four. Pause. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Pause. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Shake the arms out.

speaker: MAC
text: Now we connect them again. The jab sets the line. The cross travels through it. Nothing rushed. Just clean movement.

speaker: MAC
text: After me. Four at a time. Jab. Cross. One. Jab. Cross. Two. Jab. Cross. Three. Jab. Cross. Four. Pause. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Pause. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Let the arms hang.

speaker: MAC
text: Now we add rhythm. Not speed. Not force. Just smooth repetition.

speaker: MAC
text: After me. Four at a time. Jab. Cross. Reset. One. Jab. Cross. Reset. Two. Jab. Cross. Reset. Three. Jab. Cross. Reset. Four. Pause. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Pause. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Stand tall.

speaker: MAC
text: Take a breath. This session was about connection. About letting movements follow each other. We’re done.

speaker: VANCE
text: Session Two complete. You’re no longer working in pieces. You’re learning how they link. Session Three adds a new shape. A different kind of movement. It’s there when you’re ready.
